text.p: compliments of the season to you Sir. Hope every member of the family is doing fine.

Dr. has asked me to remind you of the urgent need to finish the modules in time. Information reaching us from has it that January 16 is the deadline for the final submission of all outstanding modules. To this end, we are craving your indulgence Sir, to please try and finish before the stated deadline, as it is Vocab. devpt and Structures that are yet to be completed.
Sir, we are very sorry for any inconvenience this might cause you.
